name: Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN)
description: A blue field bearing centred a red disc with a white border, charged with ten golden rice stalks bound together.
history: The flag of ASEAN was officially adopted in 1997. The ten rice stalks represent the ten member states of ASEAN, bound together as a symbol of unity and solidarity.

features.symbolism: ten rice stalks bound together representing the ten ASEAN member states united in solidarity
